name: klevo
description: Клёво — AI financial assistant for Russian Gen Z

scripts.db:seed: docker exec klevo-postgres psql -U postgres -d klevo -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: docker exec klevo-postgres psql -U postgres -d klevo -c 'DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && docker exec klevo-postgres psql -U postgres -d klevo -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/001_init.sql && docker exec klevo-postgres psql -U postgres -d klevo -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/002_rls_policies.sql
